mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name, delivery_order_id, item_no, material_code, material_name, out_material_code, sn_code, sn_name, category_code, category_name, quantity, identify_code, unit_id, unit, out_unit, stock_type, price, total_price, currency, total_price_tax, tax_code_name, tax_code, tax_rate, tax, exchange_rate, supply_code, supply_name, customer, customer_code, `state`, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into sp_delivery_order_detail (id, tenant_id, manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name, delivery_order_id, item_no, material_code, material_name, out_material_code, sn_code, sn_name, category_code, category_name, quantity, identify_code, unit_id, unit, out_unit, stock_type, price, total_price, currency, total_price_tax, tax_code_name, tax_code, tax_rate, tax, exchange_rate, supply_code, supply_name, customer, customer_code, `state`, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outMaterialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{snName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{identifyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalPriceTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxCodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{supplyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into sp_delivery_order_detail
id,
tenant_id,
manufacturer_code,
manufacturer_name,
delivery_order_id,
item_no,
material_code,
material_name,
out_material_code,
sn_code,
sn_name,
category_code,
category_name,
quantity,
identify_code,
unit_id,
unit,
out_unit,
stock_type,
price,
total_price,
currency,
total_price_tax,
tax_code_name,
tax_code,
tax_rate,
tax,
exchange_rate,
supply_code,
supply_name,
customer,
customer_code,
`state`,
creator_id,
create_time,
updator_id,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manufacturerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manufacturerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deliveryOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{itemNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{outMaterialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{snName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{categoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{identifyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{unitId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{outUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stockType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalPriceTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{taxCodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taxCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{supplyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{supplyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.select:
select
from sp_delivery_order_detail where deleted = 0 and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and delivery_order_id = #{deliveryOrderId} and `state` in(0, 1, 3) order by `state` asc
